name: Embedded-Deck postMessage Contract
summary: A postMessage contract for embedding a live, interactive deck inside another document (an iframe) with state isolation and cross-boundary sync: the host can drive navigation (go-to-slide, next/prev) and the embedded deck reports its state (current address, fragment, ended) back across the frame boundary, deep-linkable independently of the host URL. Composes the navigation intent and Web Portals (it does not duplicate the navigation model — it bridges it across the iframe). State stays isolated in the embedded document; only the typed message envelope crosses. Homed in webportals per the ratified distributed placement (#1175).
